name: filter-builder
title: Filter Builder
description: Domain-neutral filter builder pattern for React applications.
author: Gabriel Melo

files.content:
export { FilterBuilder, type FilterBuilderProps } from './filter-builder'
export type {
  FilterBuilderAttribute,
  FilterBuilderOption,
  FilterCondition,
} from './types'
export { isCompleteFilterCondition } from './types'

docs: Install the npm package first, then add this local registry item with the shadcn CLI. The registry targets @components/patterns/filter-builder so components.json can keep aliases.ui mapped to @/components/ui.
